velocity: Anthropic has posted a range of AI and machine‑learning‑focused openings in the last 30 days of 2025, including Research Engineer/Research Scientist (Tokens), Research Scientist/Engineer (Honesty), Senior Software Engineer (Research Tools), Engineering Manager (Agent Prompts & Evals), UI Software Engineer for Claude.ai consumer product, Applied AI Engineer roles in Digital Natives Business, Beneficial Deployments, and Life Sciences, multiple Forward‑Deployed Engineer positions for Applied AI (including a Federal Civilian variant), Engineering Manager for Cloud Inference (AWS), Staff/Senior Software Engineer and Staff Software Engineer positions in AI Reliability Engineering, Technical Program Manager roles for Consumer Engineering and Reliability Engineering, and an ML Infrastructure Engineer focused on Safeguards.
